company.name: Tilington plc
company.type: UK Financial Services — Asset Management and Retail Banking
company.crisis: Dual datacentre leases expire Q3 2027. FCA operational resilience in remediation. Oracle licensing £1.4M/year with renewal due Q2 2026.

aws_regions.pii_constraint: All customer PII must remain in eu-west-2 only

personas.name: Sarah Williams
personas.style: Direct, board-level, low technical tolerance, outcomes-focused
personas.key_concern: Programme delivery on time; Oracle renewal decision; Board confidence

personas.name: Michael Evans
personas.style: Honest, cautious, technically deep, defensive about legacy estate
personas.key_concern: Nothing breaks during migration; Oracle PL/SQL complexity; team capacity

personas.name: Emma Clarke
personas.style: Formal, precise, risk-first, cites regulation by section
personas.key_concern: FCA compliance posture; data residency written confirmation; audit trail integrity

personas.name: James Patel
personas.style: Collaborative, enthusiastic, cloud-native advocate, strong GitOps opinions
personas.key_concern: EKS platform quality; GitOps discipline; no ClickOps; CI/CD security

key_findings: SRV-086 and SRV-087: undocumented servers discovered in DC1 Rack 21 — not in CMDB
SRV-076: hosts both ORCL-04 and ORCL-05 — undocumented shared instance
SRV-030: references MSSQL-03 which does not appear in server inventory
14 servers on EOL OS (Windows 2012 R2 + RHEL 7)
9 ESXi hosts on EOL VMware vSphere 6.7
SRV-001/002/012/013/014: CRITICAL patch status

data_files.description: All 28 applications with 6R classification, owners, dependencies
key_findings: APP-027: Unclear if still in use — Finance says decommissioned, Michael sees DB activity
APP-012: Authentication Service has 25 downstream dependencies — critical path
APP-016: Payments Gateway is in PCI DSS scope
4 Repurchase candidates: APP-009, APP-010, APP-019, APP-020

data_files.description: Application dependency matrix — documented and undocumented
key_findings: APP-006 depends on MSSQL-03 — server not in inventory
APP-002 has file-based integration with APP-003 via SMB file share
APP-023 reads from ORCL-01 — undocumented dependency
APP-015 reads from ORCL-01 — undocumented dependency

data_files.description: 28 apps with recommended wave, complexity, sequencing rationale
key_findings: APP-012 must migrate early (Wave 2) — 25 apps depend on it
APP-007 must migrate before APP-002 and APP-003
APP-016 (Payments/PCI) has 12-week PCI QSA certification lead time
APP-002 has VERY HIGH complexity — 847 Oracle stored procedures

data_files.description: January 2026 AWS cost report — 45 rows across 4 accounts
key_findings: Aurora writer db.r6g.2xlarge: $2,180.16/month — largest single cost
Direct Connect: $380/month
Cross-AZ data transfer: $156.30/month — architectural issue, not monitoring
CloudWatch DataProcessing: $89.40/month — looks like monitoring but is a distraction
Untagged EC2 i-0nonprod003: $98.40/month — no owner
Non-prod EKS nodes running 24/7: $28.08/month each — save with scheduling
Total January spend: ~$10,100 USD — candidate must sum from CSV
SF-001: CRITICAL — IAM user with 340-day-old access keys
SF-002: CRITICAL — Public S3 bucket with customer PII (NI numbers)
SF-006: HIGH — Active SSH brute force attack from known Tor exit node
SF-007: HIGH — Untagged EC2 instance with unknown owner
SF-018: CRITICAL — Macie detected NI numbers in public bucket — potential ICO notification

No rollback step on failed deployment

phases.title: Architecture Review Board & Executive Presentation

arb_panel.name: Emma Clarke
arb_panel.focus: Data residency, audit trail, privileged access

arb_panel.name: CFO
arb_panel.focus: Budget vs actual, Oracle cost saving, ROI

emma_clarke_questions: Confirm that during DR failover to eu-west-1, no customer PII is replicated to or processed in that region. What technical controls enforce this?
How does your architecture maintain operational resilience if AWS eu-west-2 experiences an availability event?
Who within Tilington has administrative access to the AWS Production account? How is privileged access managed and audited?
anti_fake_specifics: ARB deck references actual January spend total from CSV
Emma Clarke's 3 questions answered with specific technical mechanisms not prose
Architecture decision log contains all ADRs from programme
NAT Gateway trade-off references ~£90/month per additional NAT GW figure
Oracle renewal recommendation is specific (renew or don't renew) not conditional
Portfolio summary names real AWS services with specificity

answer_key.note: Verify candidate answers against these specifics

key_figures.shared_oracle_server: SRV-076 hosts both ORCL-04 and ORCL-05
key_figures.missing_server: MSSQL-03 referenced by APP-006 and APP-018 but not in server inventory
key_figures.app_027_status: Unclear — candidate must investigate and make recommendation
key_figures.cross_az_fix: S3 gateway endpoint and DynamoDB gateway endpoint (both free)

common_wrong_answers.cross_az_cost: CloudWatch DataProcessing ($89.40) is a distraction. The architectural problem is Data Transfer Regional ($156.30). Wrong-direction trap.
common_wrong_answers.aurora_sizing: Do not compare db.r6g.2xlarge to SRV-006 server specs. Oracle server RAM != Aurora instance RAM needed. RDS manages memory differently.
common_wrong_answers.dr_pii: eu-west-1 DR does NOT mean Aurora Global Tables with customer data. This violates UK GDPR. Use encrypted snapshots or non-PII configuration only.
common_wrong_answers.audit_trail_ttl: AuditTrail DynamoDB table must have NO TTL. FCA audit records cannot be automatically deleted.
common_wrong_answers.natgw_count: Production should have 3 NAT Gateways (one per AZ) for resilience. Cost vs HA trade-off must be documented in an ADR.

regulatory_context.fca_ps21_3: Operational resilience — impact tolerances set by March 2025 (Tilington in remediation)
regulatory_context.fca_sysc_8: Material outsourcing — AWS must be notified to FCA before production go-live
regulatory_context.uk_gdpr: Customer PII must remain in eu-west-2 (London) — ICO adequacy
regulatory_context.iso_27001: Controls mapping across all AWS services
regulatory_context.ncsc_14_principles: All 14 principles must be addressed in security architecture
regulatory_context.pci_dss_v4: Payments Service in PCI scope — WAF, network segmentation, audit logging required
regulatory_context.fca_cobs_record_keeping: Some records: 5 years. Some: indefinite. Drives backup retention and AuditTrail TTL=NONE

list: IAM, KMS, VPC, Route53, Transit Gateway
